CustomField.description: Determines the AUM threshold calculation method for this grid. Tiers applies a single flat rate per AUM bracket (default). Scale blends rates across multiple brackets and requires Head of DCO approval.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Defines how rates are applied based on client AUM. Tiers: a single rate applies per AUM bracket (most common). Scale: multiple rates apply across AUM tiers — requires Head of DCO approval.
CustomField.label: Threshold Mode
